name: Dragon's Breath
description: You touch one willing creature, and choose Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison. Until the spell ends, the target can take a Magic action to exhale a 15-foot Cone. Each creature in that area makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d6 damage of the chosen type on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot: The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 2. Engine: descriptive-only — the cast lands as a self-buff (no in-engine breath action, no per-turn cone, no damage-type tracking). The AIGM narrates the breath fires and resolves any damage / saves via `request_saving_throw` + `adjust_npc_hp`.
